title: cleidion preussii
intro: Cleidion preussii, also known as African cedarwood or African white cedar, is a plant species in the family Burseraceae, native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cleidion preussii include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to act as a natural insect repellent. Herbal preparations of Cleidion preussii typically involve distillation of its essential oil, which is used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
